CustomField.description: MCOSF-195: Remplacement de CMI_Demande_CMI__c par Origine_de_la_demande__c MCOSF-2034:Opportunité: Mettre à jour les automatismes de devis, d'opportunité et de demande
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Origine_de_la_demande__c, 'CMI')) , Case(Status, "Terminé", IMAGE("/resource/TimelineCRM/timelineCaseClosed.png", "", 26, 656), "Annulé (Client)", IMAGE("/resource/TimelineCRM/timelineCaseClosed.png", "", 26, 656), "Annulé (Interne)", IMAGE("/resource/TimelineCRM/timelineCaseClosed.png", "", 26, 656), "Annulée", IMAGE("/resource/TimelineCRM/timelineCaseClosed.png", "", 26, 656), "Délai de clôture dépassé", IMAGE("/resource/TimelineCRM/timelineCaseClosed.png", "", 26, 656), IMAGE("/resource/TimelineCRM/timelineCaseOpen.png", "", 26, 656)) , null)
CustomField.label: Etape
